failed_checks.check_name: Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLs enabled
failed_checks.guideline: Activer block_public_acls = true sur le public access block du bucket.

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure the S3 bucket does not allow READ permissions to everyone
failed_checks.guideline: Retirer l'ACL public-read ; gérer l'accès via des policies restreintes.

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure that S3 buckets are encrypted with KMS by default
Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled
Ensure all data stored in the Launch configuration EBS is securely encrypted
failed_checks.guideline: Chiffrer le volume racine : root_block_device { encrypted = true }.

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
failed_checks.guideline: Restreindre l'ingress SSH à un CIDR de confiance, jamais 0.0.0.0/0.

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure rotation for customer created CMKs is enabled
failed_checks.guideline: Activer enable_key_rotation = true sur la CMK.

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all Regions
Ensure CloudTrail log file validation is enabled
